name: Russell Wilson
title: NFL Quarterback
bio: American professional football quarterback. Super Bowl XLVIII champion with the Seattle Seahawks. Multiple Pro Bowl selection.
faith: A vocal Christian who credits God for his success and has spoken about practicing abstinence before marriage with his wife Ciara as an act of faith. He has said, 'My relationship with Jesus Christ is the most important thing in my life.'

videos.title: RUSSELL WILSON: The Climb To Winning | I AM ATHLETE
videos.note: Full interview on faith, perseverance, and career. 327K views

videos.title: Russell Wilson: God Got Me Here... Not Shying Away From It
videos.note: Wilson speaks about Gods role in his career and life

videos.note: Full Q&A at Rock Church about faith, relationships, and football

tagline: Leads on and off the field with faith as his foundation
